name: Blueberry Ice Cream
recipeIngredient: Fresh blueberries - OR - Dry-pack frozen blueberries, thawed (2 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 5-cup blender, sprinkle unflavored gelatin over cold milk. Let stand for 3-4 minutes.
2. Add hot milk and process at low speed until the gelatin is completely dissolved, about 2 minutes.
3. Let cool completely.
4. Add blueberries and sugar; process at high speed until blended.
5. Pour into a large bowl and chill, stirring occasionally, until the mixture mounds slightly when dropped from a spoon.
6. Fold whipped cream into the gelatin mixture.
7. Pour into two 4x10-inch freezer trays or one 8-inch baking pan.
8. Freeze until firm.
Makes 1-1/2 quarts.
